title: KB Review Approved
description: Emitted by `kb review approve <id>` when a human reviewer accepts a proposed vault entry. Triggers confidence boost in the scoring model. UNCONSUMED (2026-07 zombie-event audit): kb publishes this event but no consumer was found anywhere in hearth, tengine, or tachyonac-engine — currently write-only telemetry. Not removed (cheap, harmless bus write that may become useful later); flagged so the registry stops implying something reads it today. See nervous-bus schemas/CHANNELS.md for current status.
